description.initial: Days blur together in the endless crossing. The sun rises and sets, the stars wheel overhead, and still you sail. The ocean here is calm but featureless, a blue desert. You understand now why so few have made this journey. The loneliness is overwhelming.
description.return: The central ocean crossing. Endless blue stretches to infinity.
description.atmospheric: Time loses meaning on the open ocean. There is only the boat, the water, and the sky.

interactables.name: The Deep
interactables.examineText: The water here is impossibly deep, its color shifting to an almost purple blue. You cannot see the bottom. You can only imagine what swims in those depths.
